response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel source modification, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all essential for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to build and maintain complex systems including embedded-like environments (e.g., DLang, real-time systems)
Active contributor to open-source tools and developer education, indicating strong technical communication
concerns: No evidence of C programming in UNIX/embedded contexts or Linux kernel modification
Zero mention of embedded networking security protocols (MACsec, 802.1X, Captive Portal)
No Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement for the role
